description_long: This object is a plump, short cucumber with a slightly curved, cylindrical shape and rounded ends. Its skin is a light greenish-yellow color, covered with numerous small, darker green bumps and subtle irregularities, giving it a realistic, textured appearance. The surface appears slightly glossy, suggesting a fresh, moist exterior typical of a pickled cucumber. The object is solid and compact, with no visible cuts or openings, and both ends are smoothly rounded. There are no visible labels, stickers, or artificial markings, only natural surface features. The overall look is that of a fresh, whole cucumber, likely to be found in a market, kitchen, or urban garden setting.
description: A short, curved cucumber with light green-yellow skin and dark green bumps, featuring a glossy, textured surface and rounded ends.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, curvature, and bumpy, textured skin of the cucumber.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the rounded tip and dense cluster of bumps at the end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full length and similar surface texture, with a slightly different curvature.
description_view_3: View from the other end, showing the rounded tip and concentrated surface bumps.
attribute_location: isolated in space with an undefined background
attribute_visible_markings: numerous small, dark green bumps and irregularities on the skin
